place: Pantai Lima, Pererenan, Mengwi, Badung Regency, Bali, Indonesia
title: Address Bali — Beachfront Residences, Pererenan
blurb: Address Bali is a PBG-approved, certified five-star boutique hotel residence and private members' club on the oceanfront at Pantai Lima, Pererenan — a famous surf break at the doorstep and Pererenan's best cafés and beach clubs minutes away. Fully furnished studios, one-bedroom homes and penthouses sit beneath a rooftop pool, a 360° ocean-view restaurant and bar, a Japanese garden and 24/7 concierge, with unlimited owner stays and full hotel services. A lifestyle investment targeting a 12–14% return. Leasehold 27 or 37 years; completion Q2 2028. From $200,000.
detail:
FIVE-STAR BEACHFRONT LIVING IN PERERENAN
Address Bali is a PBG-approved, certified five-star boutique hotel residence on the oceanfront at Pantai Lima, Pererenan — one of Bali's most exclusive and fastest-appreciating stretches of coast. A famous surf break sits at the doorstep, with Pererenan's best cafés, restaurants and beach clubs two to five minutes away. The project was recognised at the Asia-Pacific Property Awards 2025 and sits within Bali's pink (tourism) zoning.

ROOFTOP LIFE & HOTEL SERVICES
Life here is built around the roof: an infinity pool, sun decks and a restaurant and bar with 360° ocean views, alongside a wellness and fitness suite, a Japanese garden and a discreet 24/7 concierge. Owners keep unlimited personal stays plus full access to the building's five-star hotel services, while a private members' club and curated guest journeys make it a community rather than simply a block of apartments.

THE RESIDENCES
Fully furnished studios, one-bedroom homes and penthouses, all with access to the hotel's amenities and rental programme. Indicative from-prices on a 27-year leasehold:
Junior Studio (garden, pool or sea-view) — 45–65 m² — from $200,000
Sea-View Studio Suite — 45 m² — from $225,000
Sea-View One-Bedroom — 60 m² — from $250,000
Garden One-Bedroom — 80 m² — from $250,000
Corner One-Bedroom — 90–100 m² — from $275,000
Junior Penthouse — 60 m² — from $275,000
Master Penthouse — 100 m² — from $300,000
An extended 37-year leasehold is available for a modest premium; the pool one-bedrooms are sold out.

INVESTMENT
Conceived as a lifestyle investment rather than a speculative play: a projected 12–14% return, with the entry sea-view studios targeting around $1,800+ in passive monthly income and roughly 20% resale-value growth, underpinned by the oceanfront location and hotel-grade management.

KEY FACTS
Location: Pantai Lima, Pererenan — oceanfront, one minute to the beach
PBG-approved · pink (tourism) zoning
Certified five-star boutique hotel residences · Asia-Pacific Property Award 2025
Rooftop pool, 360° ocean-view restaurant & bar, Japanese garden, 24/7 concierge
Fully furnished & turnkey · professional rental management · unlimited owner stays
Leasehold: 27 or 37 years
Completion: Q2 2028
From $200,000; full availability and unit-by-unit pricing on request

features.l: Oceanfront — surf break at the doorstep
